case_title: AARON YOUNG VS. STEPHANIE CULBERSON et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF AARON YOUNG IN RESPONSE TO OSC FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNG, AARON

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-25-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JUN-17-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNG, AARON AS TO DEFENDANT CULBERSON, STEPHANIE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-06-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-04-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-21-2011
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON MAR-15-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS; COMPLAINT; ADR PACKAGE; CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT; JUDICIAL MEDIATION PROGRAM FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNG, AARON SERVED MAR-14-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CULBERSON, STEPHANIE
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-06-2011 CONTINUED TO JUN-17-2011 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAR-15-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 610
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-25-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
